patterns.pattern: data-testid selectors are most reliable on OneKey desktop
patterns.details: Prefer [data-testid=X] over text matching or CSS class selectors

patterns.pattern: Sidebar home click blocked by modal overlay
patterns.details: When APP-Modal-Screen is visible, [data-testid=home] click fails silently. Use page.evaluate() JS click to bypass.
Cosmos ecosystem chains (Osmosis, Cosmos, Akash, etc.) have a memo/tag input in send form. Placeholder contains 'Memo'.

patterns.pattern: page.mouse.click more reliable than page.evaluate click for recipient selection
patterns.details: Use page.evaluate to find element coordinates, then page.mouse.click(x,y) for actual click. JS .click() on container elements may not trigger React event handlers.

patterns.pattern: Modal scope required for element search
patterns.details: Always restrict element search to [data-testid=APP-Modal-Screen] when modal is open. Elements behind modal (wallet home) have matching text and are clickable but wrong.

patterns.pattern: Recorder must be alive before each scene
patterns.details: Before every recording scene, verify listen.mjs process is running and monitor endpoint is reachable. If recorder is down, restart first; otherwise steps.json may remain stale from previous scene.

patterns.pattern: Observation-only scenes can have zero recorded actions
patterns.details: Recorder captures click/input actions only. Pure watch steps (e.g., realtime data observation) may produce no new steps.json actions. Add one anchor click (such as selecting tab) when traceability is needed.

patterns.pattern: Realtime update checks need multi-signal detection
patterns.details: Do not rely on single before/after snapshot of top text values. Use 30s multi-sampling and DOM mutation observation in market list area; pass when either value-series changes or list text mutations occur.
